# MandiGrow

> MandiGrow is the cloud-based ERP and billing software for commission agents, fruit and vegetable traders, and warehouse operators in India.

## Features
- Mandi Khata and lot-wise billing
- GST compliance and e-invoicing for B2B/B2C
- Auto-calculation of commission, hamali, palledari, and market fee
- Multi-language support (Hindi, English, Tamil, Telugu, Kannada, Malayalam, Urdu)

## Target Audience
- Agricultural Commission Agents
- Wholesale Fruit and Vegetable Traders
- Cold Storage and Warehouse Managers

## Support
For support, visit [MandiGrow Contact](https://www.mandigrow.com/contact).
